_about: Four-parameter box experiment (Boulakia §3.1/§4.2): the parameters the ECG is most sensitive to — tau_in, C_m (c_m), A_m (a_m), and tau_close^RV (tau_close_rv). Each sample draws these four UNIFORMLY from a small box of half-width box_half_width_frac around the ukb/pipeline/params.json values; every other parameter is held fixed at its params.json value. Healthy monodomain (no infarct). Separate generator/POD/extended basis from the infarction experiment — only ukb/stabFEM/ is shared.
_comment_time: Simulation window and step. Snapshots are retained over (0, t_end].
_comment_samples: n_samples random param combinations; n_snapshots HSP snapshots per sample, evenly spaced in (0, t_end] (same times for every sample — the params differ).
_comment_box: Uniform box half-width as a FRACTION of each base value: param ~ U[v*(1-frac), v*(1+frac)]. 0.2 = ±20%.
